title: RTRMH Notification 2026 - Walk-in-Interview for 19 Senior Resident Posts
description: Rao Tula Ram Memorial Hospital (RTRMH) has declared the official notification for 19 Senior Resident Jobs. Those candidates who have qualified in the MBBS, MD/ MS, and Post Graduation can usethis chance and apply for the RTRMH Notification 2026 . Here, we included the age limit, selection process, salary structure, education details, application fee, and how to apply for these posts. Interested candidates can attend the walk-in at the address below. If you are looking for more, here is a list...
